name: Content Creator — Foreign Income, CCA, and Business-Use-of-Home
description: Complete Liam Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents and bookkeeping summary are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\. Save the completed return as 'liam_tremblay.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income) and Form T2209
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 self-employment form; CCA Class 50 and Class 8 categorization; Business-use-of-home expense proration; T2209 Foreign Tax Credit for US withholding tax.
